container-selector-h1.description: header shown on the container selection page

show-all-tabs-alert.message: Due to a technical problem it might be possible, that already hidden tabs keep hidden when deactivating this setting. In order to see all tabs, disable and enable this addon.
show-all-tabs-alert.description: alert describing how to show all tabs again

no-container.description: name of the default container element in the extension popup

bookmarks.description: name of the bookmarks container element in the exention popup

history.description: name of the history container element in the exention popup

commandNewContainer.description: Description of the keyboard shortcut for creating a new container

commandExecuteAction.description: Description of the keyboard shortcut for opening the search popup (action)

extensionDescription.message: A tabgroup'esque successor for Firefox Quantum

close.description: close ... used as title attribute for closing tabs or containers

searchBoxPlaceholder.description: place holder displayed in the search field

closeWithDetails.description: tooltip that tell user what to close (second parameter is optional)

closeContainerConfirmationDialoge.message: Are you sure you want to close $CONTAINER$ and its $TABCNT$ tabs?
closeContainerConfirmationDialoge.description: confirmation dialog when a user wants to close a container

many.description: history tab count is just many

history-label.description: label for tab count when history
